title: U.S. Treasury will oversee frozen Iranian funds when they're released, Bessent says
summary_full: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said once Iranian frozen assets are released, they will be overseen by Treasury and routed largely to U.S. agriculture, medicines.
summary_public: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said once Iranian frozen assets are released, they will be overseen by Treasury and routed largely to U.S. agriculture, medicines.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: frozen Iranian funds when they're released
